_meta.description: Global ERP+MOM+MES+EQMS backend capability audit mapped against current registry, contracts, workflows, endpoint catalog and OpenAPI.
_meta.authority: Read-only governance artifact. Storage authority remains database/migrations/*.sql -> database/schema.sql.

iatf_aiag_core_tools.label: AIAG / IATF automotive core tools: APQP, PPAP, FMEA, MSA, SPC

iso_10012_17025.label: ISO 10012 / ISO/IEC 17025 measurement and calibration control

fda_21_cfr_11.label: 21 CFR Part 11 electronic records and signatures

openapi_json_schema_rfc9457.label: OpenAPI 3.1, JSON Schema 2020-12, RFC 9457 API errors

assessments.label: Enterprise master data, identity, org/site scope
Quote-to-cash, customer PO, SO, shipping, AR, return loop
assessments.decision: Covered by native service-backed canonical API; migrate to DB-native only with explicit backfill plan.

assessments.label: Procure-to-pay, supplier quality, receiving and AP control
Plan-to-produce MOM/MES execution from demand to WO close
Quality planning core tools: APQP, PPAP, FMEA, Control Plan, MSA, SPC
Inspection backbone: IQC, IPQC, OQC/FQC, sampling, quarantine, disposition
NCR, CAPA, MRB, deviation, concession, containment and effectiveness
Warehouse, inventory, lot/serial genealogy, labels, recall and stock accuracy
Maintenance, EAM, spare parts, reliability and equipment readiness
EHS, permits, incidents, environment, emergency/fire readiness, PPE, sustainability
HCM, competency, certification, attendance, role/access and operator qualification
Document control, evidence vault, immutable audit trail and e-signature posture
ERP/MES/OT integration, edge connectors, outbox, reconciliation and cyber/OT posture
Lean manufacturing, 5S, CI, OEE, tier meetings, QRQC, KPI and COPQ
PLM, engineering change, BOM, routing, work instructions and requirement trace
Finance, costing, valuation, asset accounting, tax, period close and backdate control
AI/frontend contract clarity: OpenAPI, registry catalog, workflows, schema authority
userPromptCoverage: AI tools must not guess system logic
assessments.purpose: Expose the complete backend contract in documented REST paths so frontend and AI tooling can read truth instead of inferring it from code or local files.

assessments.label: Batch/process manufacturing recipe extension
userPromptCoverage: additional worldwide MOM coverage beyond current CNC/discrete focus
assessments.purpose: Keep this isolated as a conditional extension unless HESEM needs batch/process manufacturing. Do not create fake recipe tables for a discrete/CNC deployment.
assessments.decision: Keep isolated until business scope requires it; do not create fake runtime tables.
